creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry, yes, that was cleanup that shouldn't have leaked into the patch.

As for the "patch 1 of 2" -- that's just leftover from the merging of this into one patch. I didn't do the merging of this into one patch, just took someone else's work and made sure it functions as described.

I'll send an update to the Review for your approval.
